element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Taught through combat with early thugs and weak enemies
Unlimited supply; fundamental ranged tool throughout game
Essential for managing incoming attacks from enemies
Navigation tool for reaching elevated areas and traversing gaps
Situational tactical tools; limited ammo encourages resource management

element_introduction_order.element: Specialized gear (flashlight, x-ray glasses, gas mask)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Stage-specific tools required for progression; gating mechanism
Culmination of stage mechanics; tests learned skills and pattern recognition

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe platforms after platforming sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating combat and traversal rhythm with escalating difficulty leading to boss climax per stage

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic combat (melee + batarangs) against weak enemies and simple platforming; Joker boss serves as tutorial encounter
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of specialized equipment gates; increased enemy density; more complex platforming sequences; boss patterns become less predictable
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-stage levels; heavy reliance on correct equipment selection; tighter timing requirements; boss encounters test mastery of all systems
notable_spikes: Introduction of stage-specific gear requirements - forces replanning
Final levels - compounded difficulty from density and complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages requiring flashlight, x-ray glasses, or gas mask create mandatory progression gates; player must navigate with correct tool or stage becomes impassable
Each of 8 levels concludes with villain boss fight (Joker first); boss patterns escalate in complexity across the 8-stage campaign
Stages cycle between enemy encounter zones and platforming/navigation challenges; relieves tension between combat intensity spikes

sources_used: wikipedia - The Adventures of Batman & Robin (video game)
tcrf - The Adventures of Batman & Robin (SNES)
